title: Part One: Why Kidnapping Conspiracy Theories Are Everywhere
description:
Robert and Sarah Marshall sit down to talk about the wave of kidnapping conspiracy theories that recently led a random woman to murder an Uber driver in El Paso.

(2 Part Series)

https://shatterzone.substack.com/p/why-fake-kidnapping-stories-are-everywhere
